data.title: Why PMGC Shares Are Rocketing On Wednesday?
data.description:
This move comes as PMGC is strengthening its position in the aerospace, defense, and medical sectors.

PMGC Holdings announced that it has utilized the full $20 million commitment under its equity purchase facility with Streeterville Capital, LLC.

Recent Acquisitions & Future Growth

PMGC expanded its capabilities with four acquisitions across aerospace, defense, medical, industrial, and semiconductor markets. In July 2025, it acquired Pacific Sun Packaging for high-value semiconductor and data center components, and AGA Precision Systems, an ITAR-registered CNC shop for complex metals.

Indarg Engineering joined AGA in October 2025 to boost machining capacity, and in February 2026, SVM Machining was added to serve clients in medical, aerospace, biotech, and semiconductor industries. These moves strengthen PMGC's expertise, scale, and market reach.

Going forward, PMGC aims to grow through organic expansion and strategic acquisitions. Key priorities include boosting margins in precision manufacturing and specialty packaging and advancing NorthStrive Biosciences' biopharma pipeline.

ELAB at $4.15; 48.9% Below 50-Day

The broader market saw gains on Tuesday, with the S&P 500 rising 2.76%. PMGC’s performance aligns with this positive trend, indicating that the stock is moving in tandem with broader market dynamics.

At $4.15, the stock is trading 6.1% below its 20-day simple moving average (SMA) of $4.37, suggesting short-term weakness. It is also trading 48.9% below its 50-day SMA of $8.03, indicating a bearish intermediate trend.

The relative strength index (RSI) is at 44.36, suggesting neutral momentum, while the moving average convergence divergence (MACD) shows a bullish signal, as the MACD line at -1.0788 is above the signal line at -1.7407. This indicates potential upward pressure.

  • Key Resistance: $4.50 — A level where selling pressure may emerge.
  • Key Support: $4.00 — A critical level that could indicate buyer interest.

The stock has experienced a significant decline of 98.86% over the past 12 months, reflecting a challenging year. Currently, it is trading well below its 52-week high of $466.20, indicating a long-term bearish trend.

ELAB Earnings Due April 21, 2026

The countdown is on: PMGC Holdings is set to report earnings on April 21, 2026 (estimated).

  • EPS Estimate: 31 cents (Down from 7996.80 cents YoY)
  • Revenue Estimate: 53 cents Million (Down from 53 cents Million YoY)

ELAB Stock Price Activity: PMGC shares were up 20.89% at $4.17 during premarket trading on Wednesday, according to Benzinga Pro data.

Photo via Shutterstock

data.title: Meta Pullback Is A Buying Opportunity Ahead Of Earnings: Analyst
data.description:
Meta Platforms Q1 2026 Preview

An April 8 note from BNP Paribas Equity Research senior analyst Nick Jones highlights a constructive outlook on Meta ahead of its first-quarter 2026 earnings, expected in the final week of April.

The firm maintains an Outperform rating with a price target of $955, implying 66% upside from the April 7 closing price of $575. Despite recent volatility, BNP Paribas believes Meta remains well-positioned to deliver solid results, supported by sustained top-line momentum.

Key Focus Areas Ahead Of Earnings

Investors are closely watching several key factors heading into the print. These include the scale of Meta's capital expenditure and its impact on revenue growth and margins, progress in artificial intelligence initiatives such as Llama and broader AI strategy, ongoing restructuring efforts, and management commentary on legal and regulatory developments.

Valuation And Expectations

Meta's forward P/E multiple is currently trading below its six-month average, reflecting investor caution around earnings durability, the scale of capital spending, competitive positioning in AI, and broader macroeconomic conditions.

BNP Paribas expects first-quarter revenue growth of 32% to 33% year over year, above the consensus estimate of 30.8%. GAAP diluted earnings per share are projected to exceed $7.00, compared with the $6.65 consensus.

For the second quarter, the firm sees revenue guidance in the range of $58 billion to $61 billion, versus consensus expectations of $59.6 billion.

Capital expenditure remains a key debate. Investors are widely anticipating 2026 capex guidance in the range of $115 billion to $135 billion, broadly in line with the $124 billion consensus estimate.

User Growth And Engagement Trends

Meta continues to demonstrate strong engagement across its platforms. Despite a global user base exceeding 3 billion daily active users, both monthly and daily active users are still growing at mid- to high-single-digit rates.

User engagement also remains dominant. Time spent on Meta platforms accounts for more than 40% of total time spent across major social media platforms, nearly double that of its closest competitor.

BNP Paribas Investment View

BNP Paribas expects Meta to deliver strong financial performance, supported by increasing monetization of AI-driven products and continued gains in the advertising market share.

While capital expenditure is expected to remain elevated, the firm believes Meta's revenue trajectory should enable it to absorb these investments over time. Against this backdrop, BNP Paribas views the recent pullback in Meta's stock as a buying opportunity and reiterates its Outperform rating.

Price Action

META Price Action: Meta Platforms shares were up 3.12% at $593.02 at the time of publication on Wednesday, according to Benzinga Pro data.

Image via Shutterstock

data.title: Why Advanced Biomed Shares Are Cooling Off Wednesday?
data.description:
All-Stock Acquisition Details

The volatility follows an April 2, announcement. The Company entered a Share Purchase Agreement with Acellent Technologies. Advanced Biomed will acquire 100% of the equity interest.

The deal is an all-stock transaction. The Company will issue 270,000 shares of common stock to the seller.

The deal carries an estimated value of $1.08 million. This assumes a share price of $4.00.

Strategic Pivot Into AI

Acellent Technologies provides AI-powered financial verification and audit solutions. This marks a diversification for Advanced Biomed. The Company typically focuses on microfluidic biochip technologies and cancer diagnosis.

Existing products include the AC-1000 and A+CellScan. These devices aid in early cancer screening and treatment staging.

Technical Analysis

At $6.09, ADVB is trading 29.6% above its 20-day simple moving average (SMA), the stock’s average price over the last 20 sessions, which suggests the short-term trend has been strong and extended. It's also trading 0.3% below its 100-day SMA,

The relative strength index (RSI), a momentum gauge, is 72.11.

  • Key Resistance: $6.50
  • Key Support: $4.50

ADVB Stock Price Activity: Advanced Biomed shares were down 7.36% at $6.04 during premarket trading on Wednesday, according to Benzinga Pro data.

Photo Courtesy: KeyFame on Shutterstock.com

data.title: Morgan Stanley Launches Low-Fee Bitcoin ETF To Rival BlackRock, Grayscale
data.description:
Morgan Stanley Investment Management has launched the Morgan Stanley Bitcoin Trust (MSBT), a new exchange-traded product designed to track the performance of Bitcoin, marking its entry into the digital asset space.

Lowest Fee Among Competitors

MSBT uses the CoinDesk Bitcoin Benchmark as its pricing reference and offers a 0.14% sponsor fee, undercutting major competitors such as Grayscale and BlackRock (NASDAQ:BLK).

The fund has partnered with Coinbase (NASDAQ:COIN) for custody and BNY for administration and recordkeeping, aiming to provide a transparent and institutional-grade investment vehicle.

Overall, MSBT is positioned as a highly competitive entrant in the Bitcoin ETF market, with expectations for strong asset growth in its first year.

Potentially One Of The Largest ETF Launches

Bloomberg Senior ETF analyst, Eric Balchunas said the launch could rank among the largest in the space, driven by Morgan Stanley's extensive distribution network and credibility in traditional finance.

The analyst estimates the fund could reach $5 billion in assets under management within its first year, with day-one trading volume potentially hitting $30 million.

Image: Shutterstock
